properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God of grace God of love God of mercy All glorious In Your presence I remain Your love filling me again I am Yours I am Yours

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God of peace God of strength God of wonders My defense I will worship at Your throne Your sacrifice has made me whole I am Yours I am Yours

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Behold the Lamb of God Who takes away my sin Lord Jesus crucified for me This love that knows no end Your love has set me free To You I give my all I am Yours

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God of hope God of life God forever be lifted high Jesus Christ revealed in me My whole life an offering I am Yours I am Yours

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Blessing and honor Glory and power Be unto Him Be unto Him [x5]

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Behold the Lamb of God Who takes away my sin Lord Jesus crucified for me This love that knows no end Your love has set me free To You I give my all I am Yours
